extract: Weezing (Japanese: マタドガス Matadogas) is a Poison-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Koffing starting at level 35. In Galar, Weezing has a dual-type Poison/Fairy regional form. It evolves from Koffing starting at level 35. All Koffing in Galar evolve into this form regardless of their origin.
